body.title: Add 'is there a better way?' challenge to all 4 audit skills
body.result: Added CHALLENGE section to audit-design and audit-ticket
body.description:
Each audit skill currently checks whether the thing is correct, not whether it's the best approach. Adding one challenge question at the end of each audit bakes 'is there a better way?' into every step of the workflow.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/audit-design/SKILL.md, agent_datacenter/skills/audit-ticket/SKILL.md (plus audit-goal and audit-hypothesis are new and include it by design)
**Design rules:** challenge is advisory — it surfaces as a note, not an AMEND gate; Akien can proceed without answering it
**Scope boundary:** in scope: add one final section to audit-design and audit-ticket: 'Challenge: Is there a better [architectural approach / implementation] for achieving this goal? Name one alternative and why this path won.' Output labeled CHALLENGE: not AMEND. Out of scope: adding challenge to audit-smell, audit-debris, audit-day (those are hygiene checks, not design checks).
**Test plan:** skill file changes; verify challenge section appears in next /decided run.
